title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 205.976 - Department to establish service areas
text:
205.976.  Department to establish service areas. — The department shall establish service areas within which comprehensive mental health services and programs shall be conducted as defined and designated in the most recent state plan of the department.  A service area may contain several counties situated entirely within its boundaries or one or more service areas may be contained entirely within the boundaries of a county.
(L. 1969 S.B. 168 § 2, A.L. 1978 S.B. 652, A.L. 1990 H.B. 1383) 
Effective 1-1-91
